title: New features webinar - March
excerpt: We’re building at lighting speed. Join us live on March 25th for this month’s new features releases for monday.com work management. You’ll walk away with practical skills on how to leverage these new features in your …

posts.author: norawa (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml:
600_245 (4)1800×735 155 KB

We’re building at lighting speed. Join us live on March 25th for this month’s new features releases for monday.com work management. You’ll walk away with practical skills on how to leverage these new features in your daily work. — sign up now!

posts.author: TomThein (Tom Thein)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - I registered for this webinar but did not catch all of it. I received an e-mail with a link to re-watch; when clicking the button “Start now”, the link is not working ("This page isn’t working right now). Also, I can’t seem to find another link in this post “New features webinar - March” as an alternative. Can you please verify the link is correct? Any assistance would be helpful, thanks.

posts.author: Omer (Omer Fast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tom,

Omer here from the monday academy team.
Sorry to hear the link didn’t work.
I checked it and seems to be working. Any chance you can refresh and check again.

If it still doesn’t work Iet me know and we’ll look into it ASAP.

Cheers and have a great weekend!

posts.author: TomThein (Tom Thein)
posts.cookedHtml: Omer – thank you for the follow up. Yes, the link is working now. Thanks
